title: The Largest Stablecoins Ranked
summary: In recent years, stablecoins have emerged as crypto’s breakout use case. Assets that were created to streamline cryptocurrency trading are now being recognized as a more efficient, flexible, transparent medium of exchange for the world financial system. The total stablecoin market cap has surged on the back of this newfound attention, growing to $300 billion […]

title: How Do Stablecoins Maintain Their Peg?
summary: A stablecoin peg is the target price a stablecoin is designed to hold. For the vast majority of stablecoins, this target is one U.S. dollar. Stablecoins maintain that price through two mechanisms. The first is reserves or collateral that give each token its underlying value; the second is an arbitrage process that returns the market […]
